articles.author: Gerry Doyle
articles.title: Americans Injured in Iranian Missile Strike on Kuwaiti Air Base - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: An Iranian ballistic missile strike on a Kuwaiti air base within the past 24 hours caused minor injuries to several Americans and seriously damaged two MQ-9 Reaper strike drones, even as US President Donald Trump considers a deal to extend a tenuous ceasefire.
